# PERF-035 positive: fmt.Sprintf with format verbs in a request handler
lang: go
file: PERF-035-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"fmt"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func Greet(c *gin.Context) {
	name := c.Param("name")
	msg := fmt.Sprintf("hello %s", name)
	c.String(http.StatusOK, msg)
}
